scope: Priority screen of the next 500 pending no-anchor players after batch 020, covering source rows 2497-2996. Includes only researched candidates whose shared calibrated projected BBPR clears 60.
method: Start from pending players after source row 2496 with current-team values and no completed projection.
Screen the first 500 remaining pending rows, source rows 2497 through 2996.
Skip players who do not clear 60 BBPR under the shared calibration after a scored historical anchor is assigned.
For every selected no-anchor row, assign a researched historicalRating from official roster, production, recruiting, and current sentiment context.
Use official team pages first, then reputable stat or team/local coverage when historical production or current role sentiment is needed.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same calibration formulas used by the admin apply path.
Leave every row pending admin approval so source context can be reviewed before application.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, health, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

screeningSummary.excludedReason: Remaining screened rows either lacked enough sourced role/production signal, were crowded low-minute freshmen/internationals, had health/redshirt concerns, were same-name/same-team duplicate noise already handled separately, or calibrated at 60 BBPR or below.

players.researchSummary: Kruz McClure gets a 52 anchor from freshman wing context and DePaul roster fit. His sophomore development score, size, and available Big East minutes put him above 60 without ignoring that the prior college sample was limited.

teamContext.starterEvidence: DePaul's roster build leaves a viable path to a regular frontcourt/wing role if McClure converts his physical tools into dependable minutes.
teamContext.scoredAnchor: Synthetic historical anchor: 52. This is used only because the projection export had no historical BBPR for the row.
teamContext.roleCap: Selected because the same shared calibration projects above 60 BBPR; screened rows at 60 or below were intentionally left out.
teamContext.positionCompetition: DePaul's F rotation still includes portal and returning competition, so the role score stays in the mid-80s.

evidence.notes: Official roster context verifies Kruz McClure in the current DePaul player pool used for this projection pass.
Source row 2497 had no imported historical BBPR, so this batch assigns a scored anchor before projection.
